case_title: CEDRIC E. DUPONT DE RIVALTZ VS. NICHOLAS A. LEWIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: OCT-26-2008 AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, NICHOLAS A.

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE DATED JULY 14, 2009.
